news.headline: Greenwave CEO Danny Meeks talks to BNN Bloomberg, revealing company supplies major clients with 100% domestically-sourced recycled metals, revenue guidance raised to $47-50M for FY2025. President Trump to announce copper tariffs soon.
news.summary: Greenwave has secured contracts to supply 100% domestically sourced recycled metals to major companies including Nucor, Sims Metal, Cleveland-Cliffs, and Georgia-Pacific. The company has raised its revenue guidance for Fiscal Year 2025 to between $47 and $50 million. President Trump is anticipated to announce copper tariffs in the near future, with the specific details yet to be disclosed.

news.headline: Saylor’s plan suggests $2B note to expand Bitcoin holdings, adding to firm’s stash of 478,740 BTC.
news.summary: Michael Saylor's company is planning to secure an additional $2 billion through 0% convertible notes. This influx of funds will be used to acquire more Bitcoin, potentially increasing the firm's current holding of 478,740 Bitcoin.

news.headline: New Zealand 4th Quarter Producer Input Prices Fall 0.9% Quarter on Quarter
Cosmo Metals Prospectus - Entitlement Offer: CMO AU
Trump company to airdrop Solana meme coin to NFT, merch buyers for President’s Day celebration.
news.summary: In honor of President's Day, the creators of Trump's Solana meme coin are honoring NFT and merchandise purchasers with an airdrop.

news.headline: Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) plans $3B+ acquisition of Double Eagle IV Midco subsidiaries with 6.9M shares and $3B cash. Acquisition spans 40,000 net acres in Midland Basin with 27 MBo/d production. 68% assets remaining undeveloped.
news.summary: Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:FANG) has announced its plans to acquire subsidiaries of Double Eagle IV Midco by offering approximately 6.9 million shares of its common stock and $3 billion in cash. The company intends to finance the cash portion of the transaction using cash reserves, credit facility borrowings, and potential term loans or senior notes offerings. The acquired asset covers around 40,000 net acres in the core of the Midland Basin, with an estimated run-rate production of 27 MBo/d, majority of which is oil at 69%. Following the acquisition, 68% of the asset remains undeveloped, including 407 estimated gross (342 net) horizontal locations for primary development. This move extends the pro forma inventory life in the region. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Walgreens Boots Alliance in talks for acquisition, market value down from $100B to $8.4B. Potential deal with Sycamore Partners. CNBC reporting deal may be "alive."
news.summary: In December, it was reported that Walgreens Boots Alliance Inc (NASDAQ:WBA) may be acquired by Sycamore Partners. Over the past decade, Walgreens's market value has plummeted from over $100 billion to approximately $8.4 billion, based on data from Benzinga Pro. Recent reports from CNBC and Bloomberg suggest that a take-private deal with the private equity firm is still a possibility. CNBC's David Faber noted that the potential deal was thought to be "mostly dead" a few weeks earlier but has now been upgraded to "alive." Full details of this development can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Biogen partners with Stoke Therapeutics on Dravet syndrome drug (zorevunersen) for millions worldwide. Phase 3 study planned.
news.summary: Biogen Inc. (NASDAQ: BIIB) and Stoke Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: STOK) have joined forces to develop and market zorevunersen for Dravet syndrome in all regions excluding the United States, Canada, and Mexico. Zorevunersen is a potential antisense oligonucleotide (ASO) aimed at the SCN1A gene, responsible for the majority of Dravet syndrome cases. Stoke recently disclosed plans to commence a global Phase 3 registrational study, known as EMPEROR, for zorevunersen, following regulatory alignment in the U.S., Europe, and Japan. For further information, the full story is available on Benzinga.com, including insights on Leqembi and Skyclarys contributing to Biogen's future prospects.

news.headline: Goldman raises gold target to $3,100, citing central bank demand.
Firehouse Subs plans to open 165 restaurants in Australia in the next 10 years, expanding their iconic sub sandwich chain internationally.
news.summary: An esteemed sub sandwich franchise is set to launch 165 new restaurants throughout Australia within the next decade. Firehouse Subs®, a renowned American chain known for its generous portions and top-notch service, is spearheading this expansion effort. It is a significant development that reflects the brand's commitment to growth and providing quality dining experiences to a wider audience.

news.headline: FTX now starting repayments to customers; $1.2 billion distributed to small claims holders from bankruptcy estate.
news.summary: The bankruptcy estate of FTX has started the repayment process with small claims customers, distributing a total of $1.2 billion in the first round of repayments.

news.headline: Impulse reveals new battery-integrated power platform at KBIS 2025, partners with THOR Kitchen. Key tech showcased.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Impulse, known for creating the first high-performance battery-integrated cooktop, is broadening its horizons. Through a collaboration with THOR Kitchen, they will showcase their exclusive modular electronics platform at the 2025 Kitchen & Bath Industry Show (KBIS) on February 25. This innovative technology, which underpins the popular Impulse Cooktop, incorporates cutting-edge battery packs, specialized inverters, and unique features. Visitors can expect to witness the next step in kitchen innovation at this significant industry event.

news.headline: You.com and Inversity partner for personalized AI training program to upskill millions of workers globally.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, a partnership between You.com and Inversity has been formed to provide personalized training programs for businesses looking to incorporate AI in the workplace. This exclusive multi-year partnership aims to overcome the barrier of inadequate training that many companies face. The program will offer real-time feedback and role-specific training to upskill millions of knowledge workers worldwide. According to a study by Capgemini, 65% of leaders are already interested in implementing AI technologies.

news.headline: Americans are eager to preserve Social Security, revealed in new survey data.
First Horizon Bank partners with Valspar Championship as Official Bank; tournament on March 17-23 at PGA Tour's Copperhead.
news.summary: A partnership has been revealed between First Horizon Bank (NYSE: FHN) and the Valspar Championship, making First Horizon Bank the Official and Exclusive Bank of the tournament. The Valspar Championship, held at Copperhead, a prominent PGA Tour venue, will run from March 17 to 23, 2025.

news.headline: Global transmucosal drugs market to reach USD 28 billion by 2032 driven by rising prevalence of chronic conditions like cardiovascular disease.
news.summary: The rising occurrence of chronic illnesses such as cardiovascular disease is fueling the need for transmucosal medications. Significant elements propelling the expansion of the transmucosal drugs sector between 2025 and 2032 consist of the escalating utilization of these medications, coupled with increasing research efforts in the field. This surge is mainly attributed to the growing adoption rates of transmucosal drugs, with the market expected to witness substantial growth throughout the specified period, reaching a projected value of X billion dollars by the end of 2032.

news.headline: iA Financial Group achieved solid results in Q4 2024: Core EPS of $3.04 (+30% YoY), total AUM of $259 billion (+18% YoY), core earnings exceeding $1B, net income of $942 million (+22% YoY), surpassing all financial targets.
news.summary: iA Financial Group had a strong finish in 2024, meeting all market guidance targets. In the fourth quarter, they reported a Core EPS of $3.04 (+30% YoY), with $5.7 billion in premiums and deposits (+39% YoY) and over $259 billion in assets. For the full year, core earnings surpassed $1 billion, with core EPS at $11.16 (+20% from 2023). Net income attributed to common shareholders was $942 million, with a ROE of 13.9% for the trailing 12 months. Solvency ratio stood at 139%, well above the target of 120%. The company acquired Global Warranty, enhancing its Dealer Services in Canada. The year ended on a solid note, with strong growth prospects for the future.

news.headline: Government-backed mortgage insurer to cut 50% of staff.

Steven Tyler's signature Erewhon soft serve benefiting Janie's Fund & Los Angeles Fire Dep. Foundation extended through March. Aerosmith lead singer raising funds to help girls recovering from abuse & trauma, supporting LAFD Foundation. Collaboration features two signature soft serves, Dream On and Sweet Emotion.
news.summary: Lead singer of Aerosmith, along with an organic grocer, is joining forces to raise funds for girls recovering from abuse and trauma. The collaboration will also support the Los Angeles Fire Department Foundation. Two signature soft serves named Dream On and Sweet Emotion will be featured. This initiative was announced on February 18th in Los Angeles.

news.headline: Rare pygmy sperm whale stranded at Dockweiler Beach, 10ft long, 850 pounds, facing respiratory distress. Expert teams assisting.
news.summary: Over the weekend, Marine Mammal Care Center Los Angeles (MMCC) was called to rescue a rare pygmy sperm whale in distress at Dockweiler State Beach in Playa del Rey. The adult female whale was around 10 feet long and weighed approximately 850 pounds. Although there were no apparent injuries, she was struggling to breathe, and her chances of survival were slim. MMCC, supported by LA County Lifeguards and LA County Beaches and Harbor, worked on rescuing the whale.

news.headline: NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust declares $0.15 quarterly distribution per common share (NYSE: NXDT).
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust (NXDT) revealed that its board of trustees approved a quarterly distribution of $0.15 per common share of NXDT, made up of cash and common shares. This announcement was made by the company, which is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol NXDT.

news.headline: Paralyzed Veterans of America awards Code of Honor Cup winners at largest Adaptive Rugby event in US.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky, on February 18, 2025, the eighth annual Wheelchair Rugby Invitational organized by Paralyzed Veterans of America wrapped up. The event featured intense competition, culminating in the presentation of the Code of Honor Cup to the top teams in each division. The champions in this prestigious tournament included WWAR.

news.headline: Stanley Black & Decker declares $0.82 dividend per share for Q1 2025, reinforcing its quarterly payout history.
news.summary: In New Britain, Connecticut on February 18, 2025, Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK), a global leader in Tools and Outdoor products, disclosed that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a standard first quarter cash dividend of $0.82 for each common share. This decision bolsters the Company's standing for consistently offering dividends to its shareholders.

news.headline: Hansen introduces AI-powered virtual agent for customer service, increasing efficiency with accurate interactions and cost reduction.
news.summary: Hansen has introduced its latest Generative AI solution, designed to elevate customer service encounters by providing streamlined and precise interactions. This cutting-edge technology aims to optimize customer experience by lowering expenses and improving efficiency.

news.headline: See Temu vs. Amazon in-depth analysis, discussing differences beyond price.
Vanguard fund outperforms U.S.'s oldest, largest ETF by $1.5B, leading to its success.
Kairous Acquisition Corp. Limited extends business combination deadline by 1 month with $50,000 deposit into Trust Account.
news.summary: Singapore, today, Kairous Acquisition Corp. Limited (OTCPINK: KACL) has extended the deadline for completing a business combination by depositing $50,000 from Kairous Asia Limited into the Company’s trust account. This move extends the deadline by one month, from February 16, 2025, to March 16, 2025. The Company issued a promissory note to the Sponsor for the same amount, which will convert to the Company’s ordinary shares at $10.10 per share upon the completion of a business combination. This extension aims to allow more time for the Company to finalize a business combination.

news.headline: Carter’s, Inc. will report Q4 & FY 2024 results on Feb 25, 2025. Conference call at 8:30 am EST. Visit ir.carter's for webcast.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Carter’s, Inc. (NYSE: CRI), the top company in North America dedicated to baby and kids apparel, will release its Q4 and FY 2024 figures before the market opens on Tuesday, February 25, 2025. A conference call discussing the results and business outlook will be held at 8:30 a.m. EST on the same day. To access a live webcast and presentation materials, visit ir.cart.

news.headline: Valaris retires 3 semisubmersibles from fleet: VALARIS DPS-5, DPS-3, and DPS-6. Fleet rationalization in progress.
news.summary: Valaris Limited (NYSE: VAL) has disclosed fleet rationalization measures and released a Fleet Status Report. The company is retiring three semisubmersibles from its fleet, including VALARIS DPS-5, unused since the third quarter of 2024, along with VALARIS DPS-3 and VALARIS DPS-6, which have been inactive for multiple years. These actions are part of the company's efforts to streamline operations.

news.headline: HP to buy parts of Humane, Ai Pin from ex-Apple managers for $116M. - Report
news.summary: A recent report states that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the country. Over the past week, there have been approximately 10,000 new cases reported daily, showing a drastic surge compared to previous weeks. The total number of active cases currently stands at around 80,000, putting a strain on the healthcare system. The spike in cases has been attributed to the spread of the Delta variant and low vaccination rates in certain regions. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to protective measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: 8x8, Inc. appoints new key management to boost CX transformation in Campbell, Calif. (NASDAQ: EGHT).
news.summary: 8x8, Inc., a company listed on the NASDAQ stock market under the ticker symbol EGHT and located in Campbell, California, revealed new key management appointments designed to expedite the evolution of the company's customer experience (CX) transformation.

news.headline: New study by Candela Partners reveals critical shift in B2B purchasing trends towards "self-directed" buying behaviors.
news.summary: A recent study by Candela Partners, a consulting firm based in Short Hills, New Jersey, highlights the necessity for companies to adjust their strategies in order to take advantage of the growing trend of "self-directed" buying behaviors. This is the first and most extensive analysis of its kind in the United States. The report emphasizes the need for businesses to adapt to this shift in consumer behavior. It was released on February 18, 2025, and is expected to provide valuable insights for companies aiming to succeed in the current market environment.

news.headline: NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust declares dividend of $0.34375 per share for its 5.50% Series A Cumulative Preferred Shares.
news.summary: Today, in Dallas, NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust (NYSE: NXDT) revealed a dividend for its 5.50% Series A Cumulative Preferred Shares (NYSE: NXDT PR A), amounting to $0.34375 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid out on March 31, 2025.

news.headline: Alfa|SIGMA reports Comparable EBITDA of US $1 billion in 2024; Alpek's Comparable EBITDA at US $699 million, exceeding goals.
news.summary: ALFA, a Mexican company, reported its unaudited results for Q4 2024 under IFRS standards. Highlights include ALFA finalizing its transformation into a single, wholly-owned food unit named Alfa|Sigma, with 2024 EBITDA reflecting a negative impact of $54 million. Sigma saw its fourth consecutive year of sales growth, achieving record high annual volume and EBITDA, with five more brands reaching $100 million in sales. Dividends totaling $228 million were paid out in 2024. Alpek's 2024 comparable EBITDA reached $699 million, surpassing guidance. ALFA focused on streamlining operations, leading to a net leverage ratio decrease to 2.9 times. ALFA's net debt stood at $2.5 billion at year-end, down from previous periods, with a successful capital increase and strong cash flow helping to reduce debt. Fitch Ratings upgraded ALFA's credit rating to 'BBB'. The company is focused on distributing Controladora Alpek shares to its shareholders, while pursuing governance enhancements and streamlining non-core assets. ALFA's financial statements were adjusted to reflect Alpek as a discontinued operation. The changes were made to various consolidated financial statement sections to reflect Alpek's exclusion.

news.headline: James Hardie reports strong Q3 FY25 results, reaffirms FY25 guidance and FY26 growth plans. CEO pleased with performance.
news.summary: In Chicago, James Hardie Industries plc (ASX / NYSE: JHX), a prominent provider of high-performance, low-maintenance building products, released its third-quarter results for the period ending December 31, 2024. CEO Aaron Erter expressed satisfaction with the outcomes, highlighting strong business and financial performances during this period. The company continues to be a leading figure in inspiring communities as they design, build, and expand, with its focus on delivering quality solutions.

news.headline: TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. reports operating results for Quarter and Full Year ended December 31, 2024 in New York.
news.summary: Financial services company TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. has released its operating results for the quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. The report outlines the company's financial performance during this period.

news.headline: TEN Holdings, Inc. closes IPO for 1,667,000 shares, raises capital, and enters Nasdaq as XHLD.
news.summary: In Langhorne, Pennsylvania, on February 18, 2025, TEN Holdings, Inc. (known as "XHLD") and listed on Nasdaq as XHLD, a company offering event planning, production, and broadcasting services, declared the completion of its initial public offering. This offering consisted of a total of 1,667,000 shares.

news.headline: Martin's Potato Rolls partners with Hyak Motorsports for Ambetter Health 400 at Atlanta Motor Speedway on Feb. 23, 2025.
news.summary: In Chambersburg, Pennsylvania, on February 18, 2025, Martin's® Famous Potato Rolls and Bread revealed their collaboration with Hyak Motorsports for the Ambetter Health 400 at Atlanta Motor Speedway on February 23, 2025. The renowned brand will be the primary sponsor for the event.

news.headline: Toll Brothers (NYSE:TOL) Q1 results disappoint: Quarterly earnings $1.75/share miss estimate $2.04, revenue $1.85B missed $1.9B.
news.summary: Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL) released its first-quarter results post Tuesday's market close. The report indicated quarterly earnings of $1.75 per share, falling short of the expected analyst consensus of $2.04. Quarterly revenue stood at $1.85 billion, missing the anticipated $1.9 billion, and marking a decline from the previous year's revenue of $1.94 billion. Home sales revenues totaled $1.84 billion, showing a 5% decrease compared to the previous year, while the number of delivered homes was 1,991. For further details, check out the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Sturm, Ruger & Co. (NYSE-RGR) to report 2024 results on Feb 19, file Form 10-K. Webcast on Feb 20 at 9am ET to discuss results.
news.summary: Sturm, Ruger & Company, Inc. (NYSE-RGR) is set to release its Annual Report on Form 10-K on Wednesday, February 19, 2025, after the stock market closes. Following this, on Thursday, February 20, 2025, the company will conduct a webcast at 9:00 a.m. ET to analyze the operating results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The webcast can be accessed through a provided link or by visiting Ruger.com/corporate. Participants interested in posing questions during the webcast will need to access the platform before its commencement.

news.headline: HP Inc. (HPQ) acquires key AI capabilities from Humane, including Cosmos platform, 300+ patents, aiming to transform future work.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, HP Inc. revealed that it has finalized a deal to purchase essential AI abilities from Humane. This acquisition includes Humane's AI-driven platform, Cosmos, a proficient technical team, and a portfolio comprising over 300 patents and patent applications. The agreement, valued on the NYSE under the ticker symbol HPQ, signifies a strategic move for HP in its progression towards becoming a more customer-focused organization.

news.headline: Gran Tierra Energy Inc. will release 2024 Q4 & year-end results on Feb 24, 2025, and host conference call at 9:00 am MT.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on February 18, 2025, Gran Tierra Energy Inc. is set to disclose its financial and operating outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024, on Monday, February 24, 2025, prior to the market opening. Shareholders can anticipate the conference call on the same day at 9:00 a.m. MT, 11:00 a.m. ET, and 4:00 p.m. GMT. Gran Tierra is listed as (NYSE American:GTE), (TSX:GTE), and (LSE:GTE).

news.headline: Milei’s venture into memecoins sheds light on Solana's challenges; a 'Hellscape'. - Source: Bloomberg
Dow Jones improves after U.S.-Russia talks, Warren Buffet invests in new stock. Intel and Nvidia rise, while Meta falls.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones saw a slight increase on the stock market following discussions between the United States and Russia. A new stock in Warren Buffett's portfolio experienced significant growth. Nvidia experienced a rise in value, while Meta saw a decline. Additionally, Intel saw a notable increase based on positive expectations. The overall trend in the market was positive, with specific stocks making notable moves. This news was covered in a live broadcast by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: S&P 500 reaches record high despite Meta, Amazon dropping; Axon Enterprise breaks out. Markets resilient.
news.summary: The S&P 500 reached a record high, driven by growth, while major companies like Meta Platforms and Amazon saw declines. Axon Enterprise stood out with a breakout. The Dow Jones Futures also showed positivity, indicating the S&P 500's strong performance despite the setbacks faced by Meta and Amazon. This news was highlighted in a recent article from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Sandstorm Gold Royalties reports 2024 financial results; (NYSE: SAND) (TSX: SSL); Figures in USD.
news.summary: Sandstorm Gold Ltd., also known as Sandstorm Gold Royalties, recently disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2024. The report encompasses a comprehensive overview of the company's performance during this period. The financial figures presented are denoted in U.S. dollars, unless specified otherwise. Additionally, the company's trading symbols on the New York Stock Exchange and Toronto Stock Exchange are SAND and SSL, respectively. These details were made public from the company's headquarters in Vancouver, British Columbia on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Roku partners with Bassmaster for free live coverage of fishing tournaments, becoming streaming hub.
news.summary: In Birmingham, Alabama, on February 18, 2025, a new streaming rights partnership has been announced between Roku, the top TV streaming platform in America, and Bassmaster, the premier professional bass fishing tournament. This collaboration will allow audiences to enjoy free live coverage of Bassmaster tournaments. Roku, as America's leading TV streaming service, will bring this exclusive content to viewers, further solidifying its position in the industry. This partnership is set to provide unparalleled access to Bassmaster's tournaments, enhancing the viewing experience for fishing enthusiasts.

news.headline: Safe Bulkers, Inc. reports Q4 and full-year 2024 results, declares $0.05 dividend per share on common stock.
news.summary: In Monaco on February 18, 2025, Safe Bulkers, Inc. disclosed its unaudited financial performance for the periods concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, listed on NYSE as SB, specializes in global marine drybulk transportation. Alongside the results, the company's Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $0.05 per share for all outstanding common stock.

news.headline: AWH to hold Q4 2024 earnings call on March 12, 2025, at 5:00 PM ET. Company listed on CSE: AAWH-U.CN and OTCQX: AAWH.
news.summary: Ascend Wellness Holdings, Inc. ("AWH"), a leading cannabis operator, is set to host a conference call on March 12, 2025, at 5:00 PM ET. The company trades under the tickers CSE: AAWH-U.CN and OTCQX: AAWH. This announcement was made today, February 18, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: AES named top seller of clean energy to corporations globally in 2024, marking third consecutive year. - PRNewswire.
news.summary: For the third year in a row, AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) has maintained its position as the leading seller of clean energy to businesses worldwide in 2024. The ranking was determined by BloombergNEF's Corporate Energy Market Outlook. This signifies the company's continuous success in providing clean energy solutions, emphasizing its strong presence and influence in the market. The consistency in performance showcases AES Corporation's dedication to sustainable energy practices, demonstrating its commitment to environmental responsibility.
